idea.title: Bubble Barrage
idea.hook: Pop glossy drifting bubbles by hand while edge turrets evolve into an auto-popping machine.
idea.hook_ru: Лопайте глянцевые пузырьки вручную, пока турели по краям превращаются в авто-машину для хлопков.
idea.prototype: Portrait-first wave popper. Tap bubbles for coins and fever, clear waves, shop for dart/laser/mortar/tesla turrets, then upgrade rate/power/range. Offline turret earnings, free playtime parts, daily golden wave, and rewarded ad buttons for 2x offline coins or one frenzy refill.
idea.mutation_of: satisfying bubble popper + tower-defense meta + light idle return hook
idea.why_novel: The product is pop feel first: squash, rim flash, shards, droplets, pitch-up chains, combo shake, jelly neighbor wobble. Turrets are not just helpers - their visual evolution is the collection hook.
idea.non_timer_pressure: focus meter drained by leaked/crowded bubbles

sources.title: Zen-but-escalating bubble popping with turrets
sources.snippet: Tap = pop. Turrets buy and upgrade to do more popping. Juice first, offline coins, daily wave, rewarded ad spots.

synthesizer_brief: Dedicated single-game build for slot 175. Vanilla JS canvas, no external assets, fresh gf-lib copy, portrait-first. Build the addictive 10-minute loop around tactile bubble popping and turret meta progression.
